message:
chore(ftui-extras): add vt100 dependency for reference terminal testing

Add vt100 0.16.2 as a dev dependency to enable differential testing
against a known-correct VT100 implementation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -119,6 +119,7 @@ ftui-pty = { path = "../ftui-pty", version = "0.1.1" }
 ftui-style = { path = "../ftui-style", version = "0.1.1" }
 portable-pty = "0.9.0"
 unicode-width = "0.2.2"
+vt100 = "0.16.2"
 
 [[bench]]
 name = "text_effects_bench"
